Susan Atherly

Associate Professor of Organizational Behavior

Email: satherly@stanford.edu

Research Interests

Customer analytics, experimentation, retention, digital behavior, and applied data science in organizational settings.

Selected Publications

Experimentation and Decision Quality in Digital Service Teams (2025)

Retention Analytics and Causal Inference in Platform Products (2024)

Biography

Susan Atherly studies how organizations use experiments, data products, and behavioral signals to improve decision-making.
